clusters.justification: These terms reflect common co-activation in cortico-amygdalar and anterior insular networks responsible for processing valence, arousal, and homeostatic emotional states.
These terms converge on striato-cortical and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, subserving the macroscopic computation of expected utility, incentive salience, and goal-directed behavioral drives.

These terms universally engage the medial prefrontal and temporoparietal nodes of default mode architecture to mediate internally generated, associative models of the self, social agents, and temporal narratives.
